overview.short: The Chennakesava Temple, also referred to as Chennakeshava Temple and Keshava Temple, is a Vaishnava Hindu temple on the banks of River Kaveri at Somanathapura, Mysuru, Karnataka,
overview.description: The Chennakesava Temple, also referred to as Chennakeshava Temple and Keshava Temple, is a Vaishnava Hindu temple on the banks of River Kaveri at Somanathapura, Mysuru, Karnataka, India. The temple was consecrated in 1258 CE by Somanatha Dandanayaka, a general of the Hoysala King Narasimha III. It is located 38 kilometres (24 mi) east of Mysuru city. The ornate temple is a model illustration of the Hoysala architecture. The temple is enclosed in a courtyard with a pillared corridor of small shrines (damaged).

topPlaces.name: Kabini River
topPlaces.description: The Kabini River is one of the major tributaries of the river Cauvery in southern India, It originates in Wayanad district of Kerala state by the confluence of the Panamaram River and the Mananthavady River. It flows eastward through Wayanad district, entering Mysore district of Karnataka, to join the Kaveri River in Mysore district of Karnataka.

items.note: Somanathapura, also spelled Somnathpur temple or Somanathpura is a town in T Narasipura Taluk, Mysore district in the state of Karnataka in India. It is located 38 kilometres (24 mi) from Keshava Temple at Somanathapura (Also called Keshava temple).

The Kabini River is one of the major tributaries of the river Cauvery in southern India, It originates in Wayanad district of Kerala state by the confluence of the Panamaram River and the Mananthavady River. It flows eastward through Wayanad district, entering Mysore district of Karnataka, to join the Kaveri River in Mysore district of Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chennakesava Temple at Somanathapura Mysore?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chennakesava Temple at Somanathapura Mysore is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chennakesava Temple at Somanathapura Mysore?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (25 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (27 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chennakesava Temple at Somanathapura Mysore?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chennakesava Temple at Somanathapura Mysore at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chennakesava Temple at Somanathapura Mysore?
faq.a: Stays in Chennakesava Temple at Somanathapura Mysore start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chennakesava Temple at Somanathapura Mysore?
faq.a: The top attractions are Somanathapura, Bannur, Agasthapura, Sosale, Achammanahalli.
